name: RMW - MK 153 SMAW
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - For anyone wondering, it stands for Shoulder-Launched Multipurpose Assault Weapon. One of america's many many tools to turn enemy vehicles into iron coffins. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SPRINT-Canting/Sprint]
